name: Flipkart Axis Bank Super Elite Credit Card
exclusions: Spends at financial institutions (cash advances, repayments, etc.)
joiningBenefits: 2 months complimentary trial membership of YouTube Premium
Flat 30% off on first medicine order from Flipkart Health
renewalBenefits: Annual fee waived on spends of Rs 2 lakh or more in the preceding year
additionalBenefits: Earn 12 SuperCoins per Rs 100 spent on Flipkart for Plus members (capped at 1,500 SuperCoins per order)
Earn 6 SuperCoins per Rs 100 spent on Flipkart for non-Plus members (capped at 750 SuperCoins per order)
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between Rs 400 and Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 400 per billing cycle
Dining Delights discounts of up to 15% at participating partner restaurants
additionalDetails: 1 SuperCoin = Re 1, redeemable on Flipkart, Myntra, and Cleartrip for vouchers, products, and travel bookings.
internalNotes: Flipkart Axis Bank Super Elite Credit Card is a SuperCoin-earning card where 1 SuperCoin = Re 1 in the Flipkart ecosystem.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-12.
